case_title: CONARD HOUSE, INC. VS. JOEY MASSEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MASSEY, JOEY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MASSEY, JOEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 145 DORE STREET, ROOM #M SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72904473)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 73056492)

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 72669099) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72863000), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC. SERVED APR-22-2024, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 72863000), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC. SERVED APR-22-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MASSEY, JOEY
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 72891387) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONARD HOUSE, INC.
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 581)

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MASSEY, JOEY
